standard: DMRB CD 122 Geometric design of grade separated junctions
notes: CD 122 Version 1.1.1, published 31-Jan-2022 (current in-force). Covers full grade-separated merges/diverges (Sec 3), weaving & spacing incl. weaving section length and minimum weaving length (Sec 4), connector roads/tapers (Sec 5). Formerly TD 22/06, TD 39/94, TD 40/94. Downloaded from official standardsforhighways.co.uk. EXTRA (also junction-related, current): CD 123 'Geometric design of at-grade priority and signal-controlled junctions' Version 2.1.0, published 29-Nov-2021 -> file CD123_Geometric-design-of-at-grade-junctions_v2.1.0.pdf, sha256 c523f89ea4229f2d647d90addbb96246d06cf73584f9b133c3082a284cc93feb, bytes 6980786, pages 74, source https://www.standardsforhighways.co.uk/tses/attachments/962a81c1-abda-4424-96c9-fe4c2287308c?inline=true
